front.title: BBS and Modular Sub-proofs with JSON Web Proofs

abstract.t: This document defines a digital credential format that uses JSON Web Proofs (JWP) as its container format and Blind BBS Signatures as its signature scheme combined with a modular framework for attaching zero-knowledge sub-proofs. This allows a Holder to reveal some attributes directly while proving predicates such as range or equality over the ones they keep hidden. A credential can additionally be bound to an ECDSA P-256 device key, with possession of the key proven in every presentation without revealing the public key. The credential type definition and data model follow SD-JWT VC [I-D.ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc].
